tasks.subject: Task 1: Drizzle v1.0 Stable Promotion
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the "release candidate" warning in both database skills with a stable-release note that retains the casing API guidance.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md:49`
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md:49`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Neither database skill contains "release candidate" or "verify stable release"
- [ ] Both files retain the casing API guidance and migration guide link

**Verify:** `grep "release candidate" skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"release candidate\" skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Neither database skill contains 'release candidate'", "Both files retain casing API guidance and migration guide link"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: argon2id Guidance Note
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add argon2id guidance note to Rules section of both auth skills — industry recommendation for new projects, no code rewrite.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` (Rules section, line ~336)
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md` (Rules section, line ~300)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` Rules section mentions argon2id as recommended for new projects
- [ ] `fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md` Rules section mentions argon2id as recommended for new projects
- [ ] Neither file removes or contradicts existing bcrypt guidance

**Verify:** `grep "argon2id" skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md` → one match per file

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"argon2id\" skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nestjs-add-auth Rules mentions argon2id for new projects", "fastapi-add-auth Rules mentions argon2id for new projects", "bcrypt guidance unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Generalize Region-Specific PII Patterns
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace Singapore NRIC regex and Singapore phone country code in shared-add-ai-security with jurisdiction-neutral patterns.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md` (LLM02 PII patterns block, lines 110–115)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `NRIC` label or Singapore NRIC regex remains
- [ ] No `\+?65` Singapore country code in the phone pattern
- [ ] Both replacements have comments instructing developers to adapt to their jurisdiction

**Verify:** `grep "NRIC" skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md` → no output; `grep "NATIONAL-ID" skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md` → one match

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"NRIC\" skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md && echo FAIL || grep \"NATIONAL-ID\" skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No NRIC label or regex remains", "No +65 Singapore country code in phone pattern", "Both patterns have jurisdiction-adapt comments"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Remove better-auth Version Pin
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drop the hardcoded "v1.5" version reference from the Drizzle adapter note in nextjs-add-auth line 140.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md:140`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Line 140 no longer contains "v1.5"
- [ ] The @better-auth/drizzle package name and install instruction are retained

**Verify:** `grep "v1\.5" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` → no output; `grep "@better-auth/drizzle" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` → one match

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"v1\\.5\" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No v1.5 version pin remains", "@better-auth/drizzle package reference retained"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Version Bump and CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump plugin version from 2.6.0 to 2.7.0 and record all Round 7 changes in CHANGELOG.md.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Modify: `CHANGELOG.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `plugin.json` version is "2.7.0"
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has `[2.7.0]` entry dated 2026-05-07

**Verify:** `grep '"version"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\[2.7.0\]' CHANGELOG.md` → both match

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude-plugin/plugin.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep '\"version\"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\\[2.7.0\\]' CHANGELOG.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plugin.json version is 2.7.0", "CHANGELOG has [2.7.0] entry dated 2026-05-07"]}
```
